title: CatalogItem
description: A single item in the haus-workflow-catalog manifest. Source of truth for haus-workflow CatalogItem type.

type.description: Item type. 'template' for universal project instruction files.

source.description: 'haus' for first-party items. 'curated' for reviewed external items.

version.description: Semver. PATCH = wording fix. MINOR = new guideline. MAJOR = breaking scope change.

path.description: Path to skill directory or agent/template file, relative to catalog root.

purpose.description: One-line description of what this item provides.

whenToUse.description: Short description of when to activate this item.

whenNotToUse.description: Short description of when NOT to activate this item.

tags.description: Searchable tags. Must not include unsupported stacks (python, go, rust, etc.).

repoRoles.description: Repository roles this item targets (e.g. next-app, nestjs-api). Empty = cross-role.

installMode.description: How the CLI installs this item.

references.description: Optional https:// documentation URLs for this item. No relative paths — bundled files live under item.path and are installed via full-tree cache sync.

safetyNotes.description: Safety guardrails the AI must follow when using this item.

tokenBudget.description: Recommended max tokens for context loaded by this item.

tokenEstimate.description: Estimated tokens consumed when this item is active.

default.description: When true, recommender applies baseline score so item is selected unless policy blocks it.

requiresAny.description: At least one clause must match scanned context, otherwise item is skipped. Omit for default items.

ecosystem.description: Ecosystem family for cross-item conflict detection (e.g. nextjs, laravel, vendure, dotnet, nx, turbo). Required for all non-default items.

reviewStatus.description: Review gate. Only 'approved' items may be recommended and installed.

riskLevel.description: Risk level. 'blocked' items must not install.

useMode.description: How this item was incorporated relative to upstream source.

licenseConfidence.description: Confidence level of the license determination.

originSourceId.description: References sources.yaml id for this item's origin. Present when source = 'curated'.

originUrl.description: Direct URL to upstream source item. Must be https://.

pinnedRef.description: Git SHA or version tag pinning the upstream source this item was derived from.

intents.description: Natural language intent phrases for fuzzy matching during context loading.

sourceInfluences.description: Attribution for ideas drawn from external sources.
